bug_fix_workflow.overview: This workflow guides developers through systematic bug resolution from reproduction to deployment, ensuring thorough testing and prevention of recurrence.

step.name: Reproduce the Bug
step.description: Verify the bug exists and document exact steps to reproduce it consistently.

todos.todo: Verify bug exists in current version

questions_to_ask.question: What are the exact steps to reproduce?
What is the expected vs actual behavior?
What environment does this occur in?
Can you reproduce it consistently?
Are there any error messages or logs?

step.name: Root Cause Analysis
step.description: Investigate and identify the underlying cause of the bug.

todos.todo: Analyze error messages and stack traces

debugging_techniques.technique: Check for similar issues in issue tracker

step.name: Develop Fix
step.description: Implement a focused fix that addresses the root cause.

todos.todo: Add inline comments explaining the fix

best_practices.practice: Fix the root cause, not symptoms
Keep changes as small as possible

step.name: Testing
step.description: Thoroughly test the fix to ensure it resolves the bug without introducing new issues.

todos.todo: Verify bug is fixed with reproduction steps
Add regression test for this bug

test_coverage.coverage_type: Unit tests for the fixed code
Integration tests if multiple components affected
Manual testing with original reproduction steps

step.mandatory_checkpoint: All tests must pass, including new regression test, before proceeding

step.name: Regression Prevention
step.description: Add safeguards to prevent this bug from recurring.

todos.todo: Add automated test to prevent recurrence
Check for similar patterns in codebase
Consider refactoring if bug indicates design issue

deliverables.deliverable: Regression test added to test suite
Notes on similar code patterns to review

step.name: Code Review and Documentation
step.description: Submit the fix for review and document the resolution.

todos.todo: Update bug report with fix details
Submit pull request with clear description

step.name: Deployment and Verification
step.description: Deploy the fix and verify it resolves the issue in production.

option_group.name: fix_approach
option_group.question: What fix approach should we use?

option.label: Quick fix
option.description: Addresses symptom, faster but may not solve root cause

option.label: Proper fix
option.description: Addresses root cause, takes longer but more robust

option.label: Refactor
option.description: Fix + improve design, most time but prevents similar issues

option_group.name: testing_scope
option_group.question: What testing scope should we use?

option.label: Comprehensive
option.description: Full test suite + manual testing + performance testing

option_group.name: deployment_timing
option_group.question: When should we deploy this fix?

option.label: Hotfix
option.description: Emergency patch outside normal release cycle

severity.description: System down, data loss, security breach
Major functionality broken, affects many users
